program_info.title: Capstone MS in HCI Student Degree Requirements and Program Timeline

academic_advisor.name: Tiffany Kayser
academic_advisor.responsibilities: Primary contact for questions, monitors degree progress, assists with situations.

program_info.path: Path #2: Master of Science in HCI Creative Component/Capstone Project

breakdown.description: One course from each of the core course categories (Design, Implementation, Phenomena, Evaluation).
General electives should be 5000 and 6000-level courses.

breakdown.enrollment_note: Tiffany will assist with enrollment. Must have approved APC and Academic Plan to enroll.
breakdown.presentation_note: Presented in Final Oral Exam/Defense in graduating semester.

user_feedback_requirement.requirement: All creative component projects must include gathering feedback data from at least 5 users (typically by interview, survey, or observation).
user_feedback_requirement.appeal_process: Student may appeal to DOGE for review if 5 users are not achieved.

actions: Meet with advisor to review final graduation requirements

advisor_support: Schedule and submit final oral exam request
Upload and submit final creative component to ISU Digital Repository

tasks.delivery: Instructions and due date sent via email
Instructions and due date sent via email

tasks.notes: May enroll in either third or fourth semester
Required to apply for graduation; instructions and dates will be shared

constraints: Must be registered for at least one credit during the final oral exam term

tasks.deadline: Two weeks before final oral exam

tasks.description: Presentation of creative component or capstone project
tasks.scheduling: Date determined by HCI Program Director

creative_component_capstone_details.title: Creative Component/Capstone Course
creative_component_capstone_details.objective: Demonstrate mastery of learning outcomes (user-centered design, research, communication, ethical/societal implications) via a large-scale system design project.

class_experience.format: No regular class meeting. Email is primary communication.
class_experience.project_type: Develop a digital system from start to prototype and create a website presenting the project.
class_experience.process: Follow steps of typical product development with milestones (design thinking reports, academic references).

enrollment_requirements: Completion of all core HCI courses
Academic Plan Committee must reflect major professor in Workday (Committee Member: Cody Fleming, Type: Graduate Major Professor)
Academic Plan must be completed and approved in Workday (Min 10 courses/30 credits)

final_oral_exam.title: Oral Presentation: Your Final Oral Exam/Defense
final_oral_exam.audience: Two committee members/HCI faculty (acting as R&D managers)
final_oral_exam.scenario: Convince managers you are a competent designer deserving of continued funding. Not a business plan, but a design justification.
slides_content_requirements: The design problem and target users
User feedback / evaluation data (methods, results, reaction/reflection)
evaluation_criteria: Clear articulation of problem, solution, mockup, and feedback
Response to questions demonstrating depth/breadth of knowledge

outcomes.pass: Upload project to ISU Digital Repository (instructions emailed).
outcomes.pass_with_conditions: Additional work needed before degree finalized (e.g., comparative analysis).
outcomes.fail: Substantial revisions required; must schedule another attempt.

planning_resources.course_list: HCI course list with term offerings

program_completion.application_timing: At the time of enrolling in HCI 5990
program_completion.process: Apply for Program Completion in parallel with course enrollment

process_steps: Email advisor for permission to enroll in CPT-related course
Advisor submits CPT request with ISSO
Receive ISSO email to pick up CPT authorization I-20
Begin employment only after CPT authorization and start date
Submit final internship report by advisor-provided due date

steps_to_completion.title: ACADEMIC PLAN COMMITTEE (APC)
steps_to_completion.description: Group of graduate faculty or one faculty member who guides and evaluates the student. Initially, this is the HCI Program Director.

committee_members.final_semester: Another committee member is added in the semester of graduation.

steps_to_completion.when_to_complete: Encouraged in second semester at Iowa State University.
steps_to_completion.instructions_note: Documents mention 'Cody Fleming' as the one committee member name to use in forms.
steps_to_completion.warning: Do not complete your Academic Plan until you receive notification that your committee has been approved.

steps_to_completion.title: ACADEMIC PLAN
steps_to_completion.description: List of courses taken and planned to meet degree requirements.
steps_to_completion.when_to_complete: Encouraged in second semester at Iowa State University.
steps_to_completion.contact: Contact Tiffany if you have questions about what courses should be listed.
steps_to_completion.warning: Do not apply for program completion until your academic plan has been approved.

steps_to_completion.title: APPLY FOR PROGRAM COMPLETION
steps_to_completion.description: Application for the intended semester of graduation.
steps_to_completion.when_to_complete: Refer to due dates. Date entered should be the last date of the term/semester.
steps_to_completion.warning: Tiffany will assist in setting up your final oral exam.

steps_to_completion.title: FINAL ORAL EXAM REQUEST
steps_to_completion.description: Oral presentation of creative component/capstone project.
steps_to_completion.when_to_complete: Tiffany will share the information needed to request this.

scholarly_document_fee.details: Includes dissertations, theses, and creative components posted to digital repository.

steps_to_completion.title: GRADUATE STUDENT APPROVAL FORM
steps_to_completion.description: Final check that student has completed all courses on Academic Plan.
steps_to_completion.when_to_complete: You will be notified when you should submit this task in Workday.

steps_to_completion.title: UPLOAD AND SUBMIT YOUR FINAL CREATIVE COMPONENT TO THE ISU DIGITAL REPOSITORY
steps_to_completion.when_to_complete: You will be notified when you should complete this task.
steps_to_completion.instructions_location: Found under heading 'Submitting your Creative Component to the Digital Repository'

final_steps: Creative component submission to ISU Digital Repository
